name: vigame
description: A game engine designed for AI agents to vibe-code games

scripts.check:all: mkdir -p checks-outputs && concurrently --success all --names lint,type "npm run check:lint" "npm run check:type" && npm run check:build && npm run check:test
scripts.check:lint: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; pnpm lint 2>&1 | tee checks-outputs/lint.txt'
scripts.check:type: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tee checks-outputs/type.txt'
scripts.check:build: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; pnpm build 2>&1 | tee checks-outputs/build.txt'
scripts.check:test: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; pnpm test 2>&1 | tee checks-outputs/test.txt'
